code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut result = ""
mut start = 0
mut i = 0
mut first = true
let n = string.len(line)

while i <= n
  let at_end = i == n
  mut is_sep = false
  if not at_end
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      is_sep = true
    end
  end
  if at_end or is_sep
    if start < i
      let token = string.substring(line, start, i)
      let num = match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      let sq = num * num
      if first
        result = "#{sq}"
        first = false
      else
        result = "#{result} #{sq}"
      end
    end
    start = i + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println(result)
